text:
There once was a brave squirrel named Patch. One bright morning, Patch decided it was time to journey into the city. He packed his handful of acorn treasures and hopped down trees, heading right into the heart of the bustling metropolis.

Patch wandered through the park overlooking the parkkeepers' cottages. They saw him from afar and laughed kindly as he dashed between benches.

He learned many new things: people jogging, feeding pigeons, a statue of a lion. After noon, Patch discovered a shiny golden fleck amongst his acorns. He gathered a whole stash and hid away safely.

That evening, as Patch nestled into his stash, he listened to the city's gentle hum. It was peaceful, even with all its noise.

Late next morning, a dog dashed out of a window. It clapped its jaws; one fleck flew away. Patch followed it. It ended up at someone's door. The woman came out and handed him her key.

Patch joyfully scampered
